prestazioni: Engine: Ford Duratec 2.0L (Sigma engine code: *Duratec SCi-200PS*), upgraded with a *Rotrex C38-91 supercharger* (1.45 bar boost) paired with a *Pectel SQ6M ECU* for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting 350+ bhp at 8,500 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline.

Drivetrain: *Quaife ATB helical LSD* (80% lock) with *Caterham Motorsport 6-speed sequential gearbox* (close-ratio gears, uprated synchros) and *AP Racing CP8450 twin-plate clutch* (paddle-operated) for lightning-fast shifts.

Suspension: *Öhlins TTX40 MkII coilovers* (2-way adjustable damping, 400 lbs/in springs) with *Caterham Motorsport adjustable anti-roll bars* (front: 22mm, rear: 19mm) and *SuperPro polybushings* (full chassis refresh) for sub-2.0s 0-60 mph launches.
estetica: Aero: *Caterham Motorsport Sprint Evo carbon fiber front splitter* (30mm overhang, 50kg downforce at 100 mph) paired with a *Rear diffuser by Caterham Aero* (3-piece carbon, 40kg downforce) and *DTM-style rear wing* (adjustable angle, 25mm chord).

Body: *Full carbon fiber bodywork* (Caterham Motorsport Sprint Evo kit) including *carbon fiber nosecone*, *side pods*, and *rear clamshell* (saving 12kg), finished in *Bespoke BASF R-M Diamond White* with *3M Scotchcal Matte Black accents* (hood, mirrors, roll hoop).

Interior: *Sparco Pro ADV racing seats* (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point harnesses) with *Alcantara suede steering wheel* (Momo Mod.77, 320mm diameter) and *Caterham Motorsport digital dash* (AIM MXS Strada, 5-inch display, lap timer, G-force logging).
